title: Ordynat Michorowski
writer: Helena Mniszkówna, Antoni Szczerba-Ferski, Edward Puchalski
actors: Franciszek Brodniewicz, Tamara Wiszniewska, Wojciech Wojtecki
plot: Franciszek Brodniewicz reprises the role of Duke Waldermar Michorowski he played in the 1936 "Tredowata." Here, he leaves his recluse existence to help rescue the victims of a great fire, and suffers severe injuries. In his deliri...
